content: Recharts 3.8.1 peerDeps allow React 19 but bundle/transitive react-is resolves to 16.x; React 19 needs react-is 19.x. Fix: package.json overrides { react-is: 19.x } matching installed React (19.2.4). Official shadcn React 19 doc documents this override. Verified locally: node_modules/react-is is 16.13.1 while react is 19.2.4 — mismatch present.
